findings.detail: 6 term definitions end without terminal punctuation (period / 。). The pattern is consistent across JP+ZH+EN for the same entities, indicating source-level truncation at the OCR or structured-extraction stage rather than per-language translation error.
findings.example_jp: term::p258::1 JP ends: '...ソフトウェアを部品化することで再利用をしやすくし、開発を効率化する手法' (no 。)
findings.example_en: term::p258::1 EN ends: '...that componentizes software to facilitate reuse and improve development efficiency' (no .)
findings.release_impact: WARN — incomplete sentences degrade readability but content is substantively correct

findings.detail: Two sub-sections on page 256 have section_number=None. Titles: 'アジャイル開発が求められる背景' and 'アジャイル開発の特徴'. These are paragraph-level sub-headings within section 06-07 that were not assigned hierarchical numbering during the structuring stage.
findings.release_impact: WARN — navigation/indexing affected; content is complete and correct

findings.detail: Table p256::4 rows[0][0] is empty across all 3 languages. This is intentional: it is the top-left corner cell of a 2-column comparison table (Waterfall vs Agile). The empty cell is structurally correct for a comparison header layout.

29 entities flagged for EN definition length being 3-5x longer than JP/ZH (character count). After semantic spot-checks, this is expected: Japanese/Chinese are logographic (1 char ≈ 1 morpheme), English alphabetic (many chars per word). Content is semantically equivalent. No content truncation detected in EN (all checked definitions end properly).
findings.release_impact: NONE — linguistically normal, not a content defect

findings.detail: All 13 questions have answer_index in valid range [0,3] and 4 choices each. 3 spot-checked answers verified semantically correct: (1) System quality clarification → System Requirements Definition ✓; (2) Software migration to production → Software Installation ✓; (3) Classes/inheritance/reuse → Object-Oriented ✓.

Surface 'アジャイル開発' appears in both p255::1 and p256::3. These are complementary not duplicate: p255::1 is a 2-sentence intro definition; p256::3 is an extended exam-strategy explanation. Intentional pedagogical depth progression.

key_defects: F001: 6 term definitions missing terminal punctuation across all 3 languages (source-level truncation)
F002: 2 sub-section entities missing section_number metadata on page 256
no_defects_in: Question answer correctness (13/13 valid, 3 spot-checked semantically correct)
Table content (4 rows, content semantically correct)
Figure captions (2 figures with complete trilingual captions)
summary.content_topic: Software development lifecycle: maintenance process, waterfall model, agile development, DevOps, XP, TDD, object-oriented, reverse engineering, Scrum
